title: HTML — Wikipedia
content:
HTML — Wikipedia Aller au contenu Jóge Wikipedia. Wikipedia Bii jukki ab junj rekk la. Man nga cee duggal sa loxo suqali ko ndeem am nga ci xam-xam ci anam yi Wikipedia taxawal Baati HTML (Hyper Text Markup Language) HTML di wund (Hyper Text Markup Language) mooy làkk wees di wonee xëti Web yi misaalum xëtu HTML.html / HTM.htm Turu Xët wi

Mbind mi!

Ci « https://wo.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=HTML&oldid=105056 » lañ ko jële Wàll : JunjPages utilisant des balises source obsolètesXam-xamu nosukaay Seet HTML 140 langues Yokkuw tëriit
